sentence: tatkasya hetoḥ pañca me maudgalyāyana ātyayikapiṇḍapātāḥ
atra smāha iti smaśabdaprayogena bhūtamātra eva liḍarthe laṭ sme iti laṭ na bhūtānadyatanaparokṣe ātreyopadeśasyāgniveśaṃ pratyaparokṣatvāt
khe dharmacakraṃ camarāḥ sapādapīṭhaṃ mṛgendrāsanamujjvalaṃ ca
nūnaṃ virūpair adhikaṃ hāsanaiḥ krīḍati smaraḥ
vyañjanahetuḥ punarmahāmate utpannasya vikalpasya bhāvasya lakṣaṇoddyotanakṛtyaṃ karoti pradīpavadrūpādīnām
krīḍanakāni khalu kumārasya vicitrāṇi ghoṣavantyabhirāmāṇi cāgurūṇi cātīkṣṇāgrāṇi cānāsyapraveśīni cāprāṇaharāṇi cāvitrāsanāni syuḥ
balbhanam aśanaṃ svadanaṃ nighasāhārau ca nigaraṇaṃ nyādaḥ
iti śrīskānde mahāpurāṇa ekāśītisāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ pañcama āvantyakhaṇḍe revākhaṇḍe sāṃvaureśvaratīrthamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāma catuḥṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatam
saṃhitaṃ bhavati vyakṣaraṇidhanaṃ pratiṣṭhāyai pratiṣṭhāyaiva sattram āsate
iti śrīskānde mahāpurāṇa ekāśītisāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ pañcama āvantyakhaṇḍe revākhaṇḍe kumāreśvaratīrthamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāma triṣaṣṭitamo 'dhyāyaḥ
śriyam atiśayinīṃ sametya jagmur guṇamahatāṃ mahate guṇāya yogaḥ
āhārakāmam atiduḥkhaśīlācāropacāram asūyakam asaṃvibhāginam atilolupam akarmaśīlaṃ praitaṃ vidyāt
nādhīro nātyucchritasattvaḥ syāt nābhṛtabhṛtyaḥ nāviśrabdhasvajanaḥ naikaḥ sukhī na duḥkhaśīlācāropacāraḥ na sarvaviśrambhī na sarvābhiśaṅkī na sarvak
āpo me hotra āśaṃsinya iti hotrakān
bhavān draṣṭā hemollikhitadaśamaskandhacaritair lasadbhittiprāntaṃ muravijayinaḥ kelinilayam
koṣṭhe vibaddhe saruji pibet tu parikartini
evaṃ laṅghite prāgval lipimudrāgaṇanāsaṃkhyasālambhadhanurvede javite plavite taraṇe iṣvastre hastigrīvāyāmaśvapṛṣṭhe rathe dhanuṣkalāpe sthairyasthām
idam vaso sutam andhaḥ pibā su pūrṇam udaram anābhayin rarima te
sātyakī raukmiṇeyaś ca cārudeṣṇaś ca vīryavān
tadyathā bhadrapālena ca ratnākareṇa ca susārthavāhena ca naradattena ca guhyaguptena ca varuṇadattena ca indradattena ca uttaramatinā ca viśeṣamatinā
sahasrasāḥ śatasā asya raṃhir na smā varante yuvatiṃ na śaryām ity āśiṣam evaitenāśāsta ātmane ca yajamānebhyaś ca
pra devam deva vītaye bharata vasu vittamam iti prahriyamāṇāya abhirūpā
audumbaryāṃ sāmaghoṣeṇa tāvat saviṣṭutibhiś ca stomaiḥ chandasā
somas tu retaḥ savanāny avasthitiḥ saṃsthāvibhedās tava deva dhātavaḥ
ati niho ati sṛdho 'ty acittīr ati dviṣaḥ
yuyodhy asmaj juhurāṇam eno bhūyiṣṭhāṃ te namauktiṃ vidhema svāheti
abhi taṣṭeva dīdhayā manīṣām ity achāvāko 'har ahaḥ śaṃsaty abhivat tatyai rūpam
imāni tu khalu padāni bhiṣagvādamārgajñānārthamadhigamyāni bhavanti tadyathāvādaḥ dravyaṃ guṇāḥ karma sāmānyaṃ viśeṣaḥ samavāyaḥ pratijñā sthāpanā pra
hvalati vā eṣa yo yajñapathād ety eti vā eṣa yajñapathādyadayajñiyān yajñena prasajaty ayajñiyānvā etadyajñena prasajati śūdrāṃs tvad yāṃs tvan mitrāb
yāvad dṛṣṭer na saṃbhrāntir yāvan na kṣobhate manaḥ
tāvatkālaṃ tava ca hṛdayaṃ tāntimetīti śaṅke dīnāpannapraṇayaghaṭane dīrghasūtretarasya
hālāhalāt palalakas tataḥ pulindasenas tataḥ sundaras tataḥ śātakarṇis tataḥ śivasvātis tataś ca gomatiputras tatputro 'limān
